summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be a great product with excellent quality. They describe them as very comfortable and note that they look great with a trendy appearance. The color receives praise, with customers calling it fabulous. The shoes provide good traction and foot support. However, customers have mixed opinions about the fit, and some express concerns about durability.

authors_reviews.title: Really nice kicks
authors_reviews.text: Wife loves Air Max 95's and this is a great colourway. Happy to have found.
authors_reviews.author: Tactical Dad

authors_reviews.title: Nike Men's Kyrie Flytrap IV Basketball Shoe
authors_reviews.text: Great fit, comfort, responsiveness and traction from what you would want in a shoe! I would highly recommend the Flytraps!
authors_reviews.author: Rob Dawson

authors_reviews.title: Je me demande si ce sont de vrais Nike
authors_reviews.text: J'utilise des souliers Nike depuis plus de 20 ans et c'est la première fois que j'ai des problèmes avec la grandeur. Je chausse du 12 et j'ai dut retourner cette paire en échange de 13. Même le 13 n'est pas très confortable car trop serré. Je ne recommande pas.
authors_reviews.author: Madeleine Morse

authors_reviews.title: Nike
authors_reviews.text: The Shoe is below expectations and the material is very cheap in quality
authors_reviews.author: Salam Sawaya

authors_reviews.title: After 3 months of light use, started creasing near the white foam piece
authors_reviews.text: My Nike Men's Kyrie Flytrap IV Basketball Shoe Black/White have started to crease all around the white foam peace and doesn't look nice anymore. I’ve only had the shoes for 3 months, and would like the issue resolved please. Either it be a replacement, or some sort of compensation. It is disappointing for the price. I would definitely expect something of higher quality then this from Nike.
authors_reviews.author: Evan

authors_reviews.title: Good
authors_reviews.text: La grandeur est parfaite et très confortable
authors_reviews.author: carmen savard
